description: Style Note Give your wardrobe a fashionable edge with these relaxed capris from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortlessly comfortable. Product DetailsBlue relaxed capris that has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring for a perfect Fit, contrast grey stripe on the sides with two insert pockets, holds a generous cut for your comfort and mobility and is designed to be worn as lounge wear, leisure wear and active wear Material and CareCotton Machine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations
